---
name: Idea / Discussion
about: Share an early-stage idea, brainstorm, or start a discussion
title: '[IDEA] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Idea Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing your idea -->

## What Problem Does This Solve?

<!-- Describe the pain point or gap this idea addresses -->

## Rough Description

<!-- Share your thoughts — this doesn't need to be polished. What would this look like? How might it work? -->

## Alternatives

<!-- Are there other ways to solve this? Have you considered them? -->

## Would You Be Interested in Helping Build This?

<!-- Let us know if you'd like to be involved in making this a reality -->

- [ ] I'd love to work on this
- [ ] I can help with testing or feedback
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] Just sharing the idea for now

## Additional Context

<!-- Any links, screenshots, examples, or related discussions that help explain your idea -->
